notable_new_intel.headline: Jonglei/Akobo: military evacuation order + active SSPDF–SPLA-IO fighting; aid agencies suspend operations amid 280k+ displaced
notable_new_intel.why_new_vs_baseline: Baseline notes Jonglei displacement (280k+) but not the specific March 6 evacuation order affecting civilians/UN/humanitarians and the March 11 reported battle dynamics + cross-border flight into Ethiopia.

sources.title: Mass suffering after violence forces aid agencies to withdraw from Jonglei
SSPDF, SPLA-IO battle for control of Akobo

narrative_classification.note: Civilian flight, service suspension, protection concerns create grievance narratives.
narrative_classification.evidence: 280,000+ displaced since Dec; operations suspended; civilians fleeing into Ethiopia; UNMISS protective presence.

narrative_classification.note: Evacuation order and anticipated offensive can be framed as imminent threat to communities.
narrative_classification.evidence: Military ordered civilians/NGOs/UN to leave ahead of planned operations (Mar 6).
